clause: Payment is contingent on the client securing their own funding from third parties.
Payment will be made via agreed platform with transaction fees split equally.
Freelancer is subject to unlimited financial penalties for any delay regardless of cause.
Freelancer will clearly communicate when a request constitutes a new deliverable vs revision.

Any third-party integrations not mentioned in the original scope will be quoted separately.

Client retains the right to expand project scope indefinitely at no additional cost.
